headline: Eric Trump says family assets invested in 'broad market indexes' — Trump's own disclosure lists 3,642 individual trades
summary: New federal filings show the president executed thousands of stock transactions in the first three months of 2026 — including purchases whose timing critics say coincided with his administration's regulatory decisions.

headline: Dear Dell Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for May 28
summary: Dell Technologies is set to report fiscal Q1 2027 earnings toward month's end, coming off record revenue of $33.4 billion. Investors will be watching.

raw.headline: Dear Dell Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for May 28

headline: Nokia Shares Jumped After Cisco’s Strong Quarterly Results. NOK Could Be the Next Networking Winner.
summary: Nokia shares jumped more than 10% after Cisco’s strong fiscal Q3 2026 results, as investors increasingly view the company as a beneficiary of surging AI infrastructure and networking demand.
